summary: Iteration 14: Frontend validation of Greeters Next.js SSR migration (MultiLipi, TopBar, Header, Footer conditional logic). All 6 requested tests PASSED. Homepage loads correctly without blank page. MultiLipi integration verified in HTML head (9 hreflang links + script with correct key). CORS errors in localhost are expected domain restriction - not an implementation bug.
critical_code_review_comments: MultiLipi hreflang links correctly generated in head for all 9 locales (x-default, nl, en, de, it, ja, pt-pt, zh-hans, es) pointing to greeters.nexus-conseil.ch subdomains
MultiLipi script tag present with correct key 726562fe-f615-404a-b985-a73e661ee3dc and crossOrigin, defer attributes
CORS errors in localhost are expected - MultiLipi API rejects requests from 127.0.0.1 (domain not authorized). This is NOT an implementation bug.
Footer conditional logic works correctly: / shows partners section, /galerie hides partners but keeps social section
context_for_next_testing_agent: MultiLipi integration is correctly implemented. CORS errors in localhost are expected because MultiLipi only accepts requests from authorized production domains (greeters.nexus-conseil.ch). Test on production domain to verify full MultiLipi translation widget functionality.

features_tested.homepage_loads_no_blank_page: PASS - Homepage loads with 2591 chars content
features_tested.topbar_glow_cta: PASS - TopBar visible with site-glow-button class on CTA
features_tested.header_flags_logo_nav: PASS - 9 language flags, logo, 5 desktop nav links visible
features_tested.mobile_menu_opens: PASS - Mobile menu button opens navigation panel
features_tested.footer_homepage_partners: PASS - Partners section visible on / route
features_tested.footer_galerie_no_partners: PASS - Partners section NOT in DOM on /galerie, social section IS visible
features_tested.multilipi_hreflang_links: PASS - 9 hreflang links present in head (x-default + 8 locales)
features_tested.multilipi_script: PASS - Script tag with key 726562fe-f615-404a-b985-a73e661ee3dc present
features_tested.multilipi_cors_localhost: EXPECTED - CORS error on localhost is domain restriction, not bug

multilipi_verification.cors_error_explanation: MultiLipi API at multilipiseo-2.multilipi.com rejects requests from localhost/127.0.0.1 - domain not whitelisted. This is expected behavior in local dev environment.
